Customization
/color (blue, red, default) - Changes Chat theme
/setusername (blank) - set your username

Gameplay
/bet ($100 - infinite) - Place your bet
/roll - Roll the Dice

Misc
/switch opponent - Switchs your opponent
/sessioninfo - Displays how much you've lost/gained in the current session
/help - Shows full List of Commands
/money - lists your opponents current balance
/stats - shows your overall stats in chat dice
/partymode - triggers a party chat until refreshed
